title: Paraixeris saxatilis
taxonomy: Paraixeris saxatilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Paraixeris, which is a group of plants endemic to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The classification of P. saxatilis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Within the family Asteraceae, P. saxatilis is also classified as an annual or biennial plant. The detailed classification of P. saxatilis is still being researched and refined by botanists.
uses: Paraixeris saxatilis is a plant species native to certain regions, but information on its medicinal uses is limited.
